meta.title: AoD Podcast | How AI Will Revolutionize Military & Civilian Industries (feat. Dan Wright of Armada)
meta.description: War today is being fought drastically different than it was even 20 years ago. While manpower still matters, future conflicts will call for warfare centered around technological advances, with AI as the lynchpin. Armada CEO Dan Wright joins the show this week to discuss how AI will enhance both military and civilian industries with advancements like edge computing.
